name: Tofu & Mushrooms in Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat 2 tablespoons oil over medium heat.
2. Add the tofu and fry until it changes color.
3. Remove the tofu and lightly saute the mushrooms.
4. Return the tofu to the wok and add the remaining oil.
5. Blend in the flour, dissolved bouillon, soy sauce, pepper, and mustard.
6. Put the tofu and mushrooms back into the wok.
7. Cover and cook over very low heat for 15 minutes.
8. Garnish with chopped green onions and cilantro leaves before serving.
